final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit shift register that shifts its contents to the right on each clock pulse, with an input to load a new value when a load signal is low.
module shift_register(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            q <= d;  // Load new data
        end else begin
            q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};  // Shift left
        end
    end
endmodule
